questions.text: Explain salient features of Indian constitution
What do you mean by federal system of government? Give an example.
Explain the concept of 'equality before the law'.
'No person shall be prosecuted and punished for the same offence more than once.' Discuss this clause.
Explain the procedure for impeachment of the President of India.
Explain the role of the attorney general for India.
Explain the procedure for the appointment of chief minister.
Explain the duties of advocate general of the state.
Discuss the functions of comptroller and auditor general of India.
Explain the distribution of tax revenue with respect to centre-state financial relation.
What is preamble? Explain the importance of preamble in the implementation of constitution.
Explain different ways for acquiring Indian citizenship.
Explain the salient features of Indian constitution.
Write notes on methods of termination of Indian citizenship.
Explain the concept of appeal by special leave.
Discuss the classification of Directive Principles of State Policy in detail.
What do you mean by right against exploitation? Explain.
Distinguish between fundamental rights and directive principles of state policy.
Explain the powers of President of India.
Explain the constitutional position and essential qualifications of Vice-president of India.
Explain the qualification and disqualification for membership in the house of the People.
Explain various kinds of jurisdiction of Supreme Court.
Explain the powers and functions of the Governor of Kerala state.
Explain the composition and duration of state legislative council.
Explain the qualification and disqualification for membership of the state legislature.
Explain the constitution of High court. What are the essential qualifications required for the appointment of High court Judge?
Explain parliamentary legislation in the state field.
Discuss the effects of national and financial emergencies.
Explain the procedure for amendment of the constitution.
What is the need for administrative tribunals? Explain the functions of state administrative tribunals.
